ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., South, West) */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the state */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* GINI coefficient of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "rfr_rmse" REAL /* RFR RMSE for the region */,
  "gbr_rmse" REAL /* GBR RMSE for the region */,
  "voting_rmse" REAL /* Voting RMSE for the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_data" (
  "us_rfr_rmse" REAL /* National RFR RMSE */,
  "us_gbr_rmse" REAL /* National GBR RMSE */,
  "us_voting_rmse" REAL /* National Voting RMSE */,
  "median_income" REAL /* National median income */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* National unemployment rate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* National population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("us_rfr_rmse")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regression model */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the model belongs to */,
  "rfr_rmse" REAL /* RFR RMSE for the state */,
  "gbr_rmse" REAL /* GBR RMSE for the state */,
  "voting_rmse" REAL /* Voting RMSE for the state */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of regression model (e.g., linear, logistic, decision tree) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Details of the training data */,
  "testing_data" TEXT /* Details of the testing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_models_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "voting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the voting result belongs to */,
  "voting_result" TEXT /* Voting result for the state */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Number of Democrat votes */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of Republican votes */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of other votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the data import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
column_names: Region the state belongs to (e.g., South, West)
